label_verbatim: [top recital, line 1] (corporation name) — the merging corporation
rationale: Top recital line 1 — the name of the corporation that is merging INTO the surviving corp. Wide widget (rect width ~258pt). Drafter originally swapped names/jurisdictions across fields 1-4 — corrected here.

label_verbatim: (A corporation organized under the laws of) ___ [merging corp jurisdiction blank]
rationale: Inline jurisdiction blank inside the parenthetical descriptor that follows the merging-corp name. Narrow widget (rect width ~115pt) indented to right of center.

label_verbatim: INTO / [top recital, line 2] (corporation name) — the surviving corporation
rationale: Top recital line 2 (after the 'INTO' header) — the name of the corporation that survives the merger. Wide widget paralleling field 1.

label_verbatim: (A corporation organized under the laws of) ___ [surviving corp jurisdiction blank]
rationale: Inline jurisdiction blank for the surviving corporation in the top recital.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ("X" one box only.) If the surviving corporation is a Maine corporation: [ ] public benefit corporation
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=293.3); enum_select value 'public_benefit'.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ("X" one box only.) If the surviving corporation is a Maine corporation: [ ] mutual benefit corporation
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=293.7); enum_select value 'mutual_benefit'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The laws of the State(s) of ___ under which the foreign corporation(s) is (are) organized permit such merger
rationale: Free-text list of state(s) whose laws permit the merger (foreign corp's home jurisdiction(s)). When there is one foreign party, this restates merger.merging_corp.home_jurisdiction or merger.surviving_corp.home_jurisdiction (whichever is foreign). Multiple foreign corps possible.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The name of the surviving corporation is
rationale: THIRD-paragraph re-statement of the surviving corp's name. Same canonical key as field 3 — synth must populate consistently.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ... and it is to be governed by the laws of the State of
rationale: THIRD-paragraph re-statement of the surviving corp's governing law. Same canonical key as field 4.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ... the address to which the Secretary of State shall mail a copy of any process in such proceeding is
rationale: Service-of-process address for the surviving corp — only required when the surviving corp is foreign (so Maine SOS knows where to forward process). Single-line combined address.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The plan of merger is set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof
rationale: Inline exhibit-letter blank for the plan-of-merger document. Matches NP_MNPCA-10's merger.plan_exhibit_letter.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: ('X' one box only.) As to the domestic corporation, the plan of merger was adopted in the following manner: Name of Corporation
rationale: Name of the domestic (Maine) corporation whose adoption is being recited. Only one adoption recital because only the domestic corp's adoption method is governed by Maine law; foreign corp adoption is governed by foreign law. This restates whichever of merger.merging_corp.name or merger.surviving_corp.name is the Maine party.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: [ ] By the members at a meeting on (date) ___, at which a quorum was present and such plan received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=568.9); enum_select value 'majority_member_vote'. FIFTH option 1: enum value 'majority_member_vote'. Same enum values as NP_MNPCA-10's merger.parties[N].vote_method.

label_verbatim: FIFTH option 1 (date)
rationale: Date paired with FIFTH option 1 (majority member vote). All four date fields (14, 16, 18, 20) bind to the same canonical key — only the date for the selected option is filled.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: [ ] If the Articles of Incorporation require more than a majority vote, by the members at a meeting on (date) ___, and such plan received at least the percentage of votes of the members required by the Articles of Incorporation.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=606.0); enum_select value 'supermajority_member_vote'. FIFTH option 2: enum value 'supermajority_member_vote'.

label_verbatim: FIFTH option 2 (date)
rationale: Date paired with FIFTH option 2 (supermajority member vote).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: [ ] By the written consent of all members entitled to vote with respect thereto, dated ___, without resolution of the board of directors.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=652.3); enum_select value 'written_consent_of_members'. FIFTH option 3: enum value 'written_consent_of_members'.

label_verbatim: FIFTH option 3 (date)
rationale: Date paired with FIFTH option 3 (written consent).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: [ ] There being no members, or no members entitled to vote thereon, the plan was adopted by a majority vote of the board of directors in office at a meeting held on ___.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=688.9); enum_select value 'board_of_directors_majority_vote'. FIFTH option 4: enum value 'board_of_directors_majority_vote' (used when there are no voting members).

label_verbatim: FIFTH option 4 (date)
rationale: Date paired with FIFTH option 4 (board majority vote).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The address of the registered office of the surviving corporation in the State of Maine is ___ [trailing inline blank]
rationale: Narrow trailing blank ending the SIXTH paragraph 1 sentence. Combined with line2 (field 22) for the full address. Matches NP_MNPCA-10's address_line1/line2 split.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (street, city, state and zip code) — surviving corp
rationale: Wide labeled line below the SIXTH paragraph for the surviving corp's Maine registered-office address (street, city, state, zip).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The address of the registered office of the merged corporation in the State of Maine is ___ [trailing inline blank]
rationale: Narrow trailing blank for SIXTH paragraph 2.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (street, city, state and zip code) — merged corp
rationale: Wide labeled line for the merged (merging) corp's Maine registered-office address.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: Effective date of the merger (if later than date of filing of Articles) is ___ (Not to exceed 60 days from date of filing of the Articles)
rationale: Optional future effective date capped at 60 days post-filing (matches NP_MNPCA-10/10A).

label_verbatim: DATED ___ [surviving corp signature block date]
rationale: Date the surviving corp signed. Per-corporation date (not the universal filing.date_signed) because each corp's officers may sign on different dates. Matches NP_MNPCA-10's pattern.

label_verbatim: (surviving corporation) — corp-name underline next to DATED row
rationale: Right-side blank labeled '(surviving corporation)' on the DATED row — restates the surviving corp's name. Field has read-only flag (4194304) on this template, suggesting the SOS template intends this to be auto-filled from field 3; in practice the filler must populate it explicitly to match merger.surviving_corp.name.

label_verbatim: **By (signature) ___ / (type or print name and capacity) — surviving corp signer 1
rationale: Surviving corp signer 1 — Shape D (printed name + capacity combined). The (signature) line is wet-ink only (no AcroForm widget). 13-B MRSA §906 requires officer signature.

label_verbatim: **By (signature) ___ / (type or print name and capacity) — surviving corp signer 2
rationale: Surviving corp signer 2. Two signer slots per party because some entity types under 13-B MRSA require two signers (e.g., president + clerk).

label_verbatim: DATED ___ [merged corp signature block date]
rationale: Date the merging (merged) corp signed.

label_verbatim: (merged corporation) — corp-name underline next to DATED row
rationale: Right-side blank labeled '(merged corporation)' on the second DATED row. Restates the merging corp's name.

label_verbatim: **By (signature) ___ / (type or print name and capacity) — merged corp signer 1
rationale: Merging corp signer 1.

label_verbatim: **By (signature) ___ / (type or print name and capacity) — merged corp signer 2
rationale: Merging corp signer 2.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (typically populated with the surviving corp's name).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (typically populated with the merging corp's name).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.

label_verbatim: 24-hour expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.

label_verbatim: Immediate expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.

label_verbatim: Total fee(s) enclosed: $
rationale: Total fees ($25 minimum per page-0 header) plus expedite premium.

label_verbatim: Name of contact person
rationale: Contact name.

label_verbatim: Daytime telephone number
rationale: Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.

label_verbatim: Name of attested copy recipient
rationale: Recipient name.

label_verbatim: Firm or Company
rationale: Recipient firm.

label_verbatim: Mailing Address
rationale: Recipient street.

label_verbatim: City, State & Zip
rationale: Recipient city/state/zip combined.
